fact.fact: The Sistema Interconectado Nacional (SIN) has been operated by XM since at least 2005, with annual reports on its operation and administration of the Mercado de Energía Mayorista (MEM) published every year since then.
fact.source_text: En este espacio Usted podrá conocer el histórico de los Informes de operación del SIN y administración del mercado de XM desde el año 2005
fact.source_document: Informe Anual del Operador del Sistema

verdict.reason: The source text does not mention XM operating the SIN, it only mentions XM's market.

fact.fact: XM has published annual reports on the operation of the Sistema Interconectado Nacional (SIN) and administration of the Mercado de Energía Mayorista (MEM) for 20 years, from 2005 to 2025.
fact.source_text: 2025 Reporte de gestión y sostenibilidad 2025 ...  Informe Operación del SIN y Administración del Mercado 2005
fact.source_document: Informe Anual del Operador del Sistema

verdict.reason: The source text only mentions reports for 2005 and 2025, but the fact claims reports for 20 years, from 2005 to 2025, implying reports for every year in between.
